languages.text: "Демонстрация разумно-критического подхода сервочерепом "Нунциус" зафиксировано в логах. Статус сервочерепа "Нунциус" повышен. Статус генетора Эоганна Фебруса не пересматривается".

"The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."
languages.original_text: "Демонстрация разумно-критического подхода сервочерепом "Нунциус" зафиксировано в логах. Статус сервочерепа "Нунциус" повышен. Статус генетора Эоганна Фебруса не пересматривается".

languages.text: «Queda registrada la demostración del método crítico racional del servocráneo "Nuncius". El estado de dicho servocráneo se ha elevado. El estado del genetor Eogunn Februs permanece en su posición original».
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: «Queda registrada la demostración del método crítico racional del servocráneo "Nuncius". El estado de dicho servocráneo se ha elevado. El estado del genetor Eogunn Februs permanece en su posición original».

languages.text: “已记录伺服头骨‘努恩修斯’展现出的理性批判方法。伺服头骨‘努恩修斯’的评级已提升。基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯的评级保持不变。”
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: “已记录伺服头骨‘努恩修斯’展现出的理性批判方法。伺服头骨‘努恩修斯’的评级已提升。基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯的评级保持不变。”

languages.text: "Die Demonstration eines rational-kritischen Ansatzes durch den Servoschädel 'Nuncius' wird vermerkt. Der Status des Servoschädels 'Nuncius' wurde erhöht. Der Status von Genetor Eogunn Februs bleibt unverändert."
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: "Die Demonstration eines rational-kritischen Ansatzes durch den Servoschädel 'Nuncius' wird vermerkt. Der Status des Servoschädels 'Nuncius' wurde erhöht. Der Status von Genetor Eogunn Februs bleibt unverändert."

languages.text: « La démonstration d'une approche critique rationnelle par le servocrâne "Nuncius" a été dûment enregistrée. Son statut a été élevé au niveau supérieur. Le statut du genetor Eogunn Februs, lui, demeure inchangé. »
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: « La démonstration d'une approche critique rationnelle par le servocrâne "Nuncius" a été dûment enregistrée. Son statut a été élevé au niveau supérieur. Le statut du genetor Eogunn Februs, lui, demeure inchangé. »

languages.text: "Hizmelet 'Nuncius'un rasyonel ve eleştirel bir yaklaşım sergilediği kaydedildi. Hizmelet 'Nuncius'un statüsü yükseltildi. Genetör Eogunn Februs'un statüsü ise değişmedi."
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: "Hizmelet 'Nuncius'un rasyonel ve eleştirel bir yaklaşım sergilediği kaydedildi. Hizmelet 'Nuncius'un statüsü yükseltildi. Genetör Eogunn Februs'un statüsü ise değişmedi."

languages.text: 「サーボスカル『ヌンシウス』の合理的批判的アプローチのデモが記録されました。サーボスカル『ヌンシウス』のステータスが引き上げられました。ジェネーター・イオグン・フェブルスのステータスは変更されません。」
languages.original_text: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."

traits.locale_text: 「サーボスカル『ヌンシウス』の合理的批判的アプローチのデモが記録されました。サーボスカル『ヌンシウス』のステータスが引き上げられました。ジェネーター・イオグン・フェブルスのステータスは変更されません。」
